comment: Plugins the scaffolded architecture depends on. /agentic-init verifies each against ~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json and registers missing ones via extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins in the target repo's .claude/settings.json (a session restart activates them; /agentic-doctor tracks 'pending restart').

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.why: Process skills: brainstorming, TDD, systematic debugging, verification-before-completion. Fallback marketplace: obra/superpowers-marketplace (if not present in the official marketplace).

plugins.name: agentic-sdlc
plugins.why: SDLC pipeline + decision-router (HITL/autonomous judgment gates with escalation and audit).

plugins.name: ponytail
plugins.why: YAGNI/minimalism mode. Recommended; not required by any gate.
